name: Pea Shoot Salad with Jerusalem Artichokes
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel the Jerusalem artichokes and quarter them.
2. Cut the quarters into very thin slices.
3. In a small bowl, combine chopped mint, vinegar, sugar, oil, salt, and pepper. Whisk to combine.
4. Add the sliced Jerusalem artichokes to the mixture; gently stir to coat.
5. Arrange pea shoots on salad plates.
6. Using a slotted spoon, remove the artichoke slices from the vinaigrette and place them on top of the pea shoots.
7. Drizzle the vinaigrette over each salad.
8. Garnish with mint leaves.
The San Francisco Chronicle, November 15, 1995
Serves 8.
